---
title: "About Foundation Stack"
---

## What this site is

**Foundation Stack** is a **52-week, continuously updated** publication on **aerobic exercise prescription for adolescents with persistent post-concussive symptoms (PPCS)**. Each week follows the same structure: problem → comparison table → disagreements → methods → clinical SOP → limitations.

## Who it is for

- Athletic trainers and physical therapists  
- Sport medicine and rehabilitation researchers  
- Parents and athletes navigating prolonged recovery  

## Four pillars

| Code | Focus |
|------|--------|
| `reproduce` | Landmark trial dose–outcome logic |
| `methods` | Measurement, adherence, endpoint coding |
| `synth` | Priors, dashboards, thought experiments |
| `sop` | Pitfalls and Monday-morning checklists |

## Author

**Guang Li (Jack)** — graduate researcher in athletic training, Idaho State University. Personal site: [guanglab.org](https://guanglab.org/).

## Privacy note

This site is **public**. Internal dissertation workflows, advisor materials, and restricted project hubs are **not** linked here.

## Subscribe

Use the **RSS feed** linked from the [series hub](/index.html) listing page.
